name: codex-usage-widget
description: Display current Codex usage and remaining allowance from local session data.

interface.shortDescription: Show current Codex usage and reset time.
interface.longDescription: Reads the latest rate-limit snapshot written by Codex to local session logs and reports used allowance, remaining allowance, window duration, reset time, and credits status. No network requests or credentials are used.
defaultPrompt: 查看我的 Codex 使用量
Codex 使用额度什么时候重置？
